description: Scan clinical text for the 18 HIPAA identifiers and ages over 89, returning a de-identification compliance report (read-only).
rules: read-only — never edits or redacts the input report
scans for all 18 HIPAA Safe-Harbor identifiers (names, dates, phone, SSN, MRN, URLs, IPs, etc.) plus ages >89
assigns CRITICAL / HIGH / MEDIUM severity and an overall COMPLIANT / NEEDS_REVIEW / NON_COMPLIANT status
JSON report written to record_store; the porter does not fail the step on detected violations
usage: Set REPORT_FILE (any clinical text/.md). Output: deidentification.json.
limitation: Regex detection — yields false positives/negatives and is not a certified de-identification tool. Requires python3 (stdlib only).
